title: In the Air Tonight
why_this_song: In the Air Tonight by Phil Collins (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lord" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lord" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, if you told me you were drowning
I saw it with my own two eyes

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "In the Air Tonight" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "In the Air Tonight"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Phil Collins one question about "In the Air Tonight", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Phil Collins sobre "In the Air Tonight", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "In the Air Tonight" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "In the Air Tonight" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "In the Air Tonight", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "In the Air Tonight", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "In the Air Tonight" was released in 1981. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "In the Air Tonight" foi lançada em 1981. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "In the Air Tonight" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "In the Air Tonight" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "In the Air Tonight" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "In the Air Tonight" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "In the Air Tonight" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "In the Air Tonight", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
